sections.paragraph:
Original: חורן

Transliteration: chavrân

Phonetic: khav-rawn'

BDB Definition:

Hauran = "caverns"
  1. a province of Palestine east of the Sea of Galilee; exact region uncertain but probably on the borders of the desert in the tetrarchy of Philip

Origin: apparently from H2357 (in the sense of H2352)

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
